title: helianthemum virgatum var. vesicarium
intro: Helianthemum virgatum var. vesicarium, also known as rockrose or fragrant rockrose, is a flowering plant that belongs to the Cistaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating wounds, burns, and skin conditions due to its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Helianthemum virgatum var. vesicarium include its ability to reduce inflammation, promote wound healing, and exhibit antimicrobial activity. Herbal preparations of rockrose can be found in the form of infusions, tinctures, and topical creams, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
